text.tspan: Elivagar
pbfhogg
Nidhogg
pbfhogg: Deep forest green + gunmetal gray + blood-red accent (striking/processing energy).
elivagar: Icy cyan/blue + frost white + subtle silver (primordial rivers + Shortbread "lean & clean").
nidhogg: Obsidian black + deep emerald + glowing ember red (underworld roots + server guardian).
pbfhogg: Deep forest green + gunmetal gray + blood-red accent (striking/processing energy).
elivagar: Icy cyan/blue + frost white + subtle silver (primordial rivers + Shortbread "lean & clean").
nidhogg: Obsidian black + deep emerald + glowing ember red (underworld roots + server guardian).
1. The "Special Ops" Palette
Theme: Rugged, tactical, and authoritative. Best for heavy-duty or administrative tools.
Element Color Name Hex Code Usage
Primary Deep Forest #1B2E21 Sidebars, primary buttons
Secondary Gunmetal #2C3335 Main backgrounds, cards
Accent Blood Red #880808 Alerts, critical errors, "Delete"
Text Silver Grey #D1D1D1 Primary labels and icons
2. The "Cryo-Tech" Palette
Theme: Precision, speed, and clinical efficiency. Best for analytics or monitoring tools.
Element Color Name Hex Code Usage
Primary Icy Cyan #00A3C4 Active states, primary text
Secondary Frost White #F0F8FF Main background (light mode) or text
Accent Subtle Silver #BFC1C2 Borders, dividers, disabled states
Deep Note Arctic Blue #1A2A3A Background (if dark mode)
3. The "Infernal Core" Palette
Theme: Power, luxury, and "final boss" energy. Best for advanced settings or high-performance modes.
Element Color Name Hex Code Usage
Primary Obsidian #0B0B0C Deepest background layers
Secondary Deep Emerald #043927 Subtle glows, secondary buttons
Accent Ember Red #FF4500 Highlights, hovering, CTA buttons
Mid-Tone Charcoal #1E1E1E Section containers
The "Glow" Factor: For the Ember Red and Icy Cyan, use a slight CSS box-shadow or drop-shadow to give them that "glowing" feel against the dark backgrounds.
Balance: Since these are very dark and saturated palettes, ensure your text contrast ratios are high. Stick to the Silver/White tones for readability—don't put Blood Red text on Gunmetal!
Elivagar
pbfhogg
